name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Urban 2.0 (PMAY-U 2.0)
description: Urban housing scheme supporting eligible families to construct, purchase, or improve a pucca house through applicable assistance and interest-subsidy components.

benefit.description: Financial assistance or interest subsidy is available under applicable PMAY-U 2.0 components, subject to current guidelines.

other_conditions: Applicant household must meet the applicable income, property-ownership, city, and component conditions under PMAY-U 2.0.

required_documents: Property or Land Documents if applicable

ai_metadata.estimated_processing_time: Subject to urban local body verification

ai_explanation.summary: Housing support for eligible urban households without a pucca house, subject to component rules.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Confirm your city, household income, home-ownership status, and eligible PMAY-U 2.0 component.
common_rejection_reasons: Household already owns an ineligible pucca house
City or component criteria not met
tips: Ensure property and identity records carry consistent names and addresses.
next_steps: Apply through the official portal or local body process.

source.organization: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G)
description: Rural housing scheme that assists eligible houseless and kutcha-household families in obtaining a pucca house with basic amenities.

benefit.amount: Varies by area and current guidelines
benefit.description: Unit assistance is provided to eligible rural households according to current PMAY-G norms and local implementation.

other_conditions: Household selection is based on the applicable rural deprivation and verification process under PMAY-G.

benefits.financial: Varies by area and current guidelines

ai_metadata.estimated_processing_time: Subject to local verification and sanction

ai_explanation.summary: Housing assistance for eligible rural households identified under PMAY-G.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Check whether your household is listed and verify the local eligibility and sanction process.
tips: Contact the Gram Panchayat if household details need correction.
frequently_asked_questions: How do I check my status?
next_steps: Contact the local Gram Panchayat for verification.
